message: Dear Students, Welcome to the Fine Arts Club, where imagination meets expression and creativity knows no bounds! We are a vibrant and inclusive community that celebrates creativity in all its forms. From designing visuals and creating digital content to designing walls and artistic projects across campus during Technovit and Vibrance, our club plays an active role in shaping the creative identity of the campus. Whether you’re an experienced artist, a curious beginner, or someone who simply enjoys working in creative spaces, there’s a place for you here. We are now inviting passionate and committed individuals to be a part of our growing team. Explore the following departments and find your niche: 🎨 Design Team Bring ideas to life through posters, branding, social media creatives, visual storytelling, and artistic concepts for club projects and campus artworks. Perfect for creative minds with an eye for aesthetics and familiarity with tools like Canva or Photoshop. 📢 Publicity Team Handle social media campaigns, promotions, and audience engagement while helping the club connect with more people creatively. Great for trend-savvy individuals who enjoy content creation, marketing, and communication. 📋 Management & Projects Team Plan, coordinate, and execute club activities while ensuring smooth workflow and timely completion of tasks. Best suited for organized, responsible, and execution-oriented individuals who work well in teams. 💻 Technical Team Manage website monitoring, form submissions, digital records, and technical coordination during events and activities. Ideal for responsible problem-solvers with basic coding knowledge and familiarity with websites, hosting, domains, or platforms like Vercel. While every team has its own responsibilities, what truly makes the club grow is collaboration, supporting each other, and stepping up whenever needed. Every department works hand in hand because the best ideas come to life when we create together as a team. At the Fine Arts Club, we believe in nurturing talent and fostering growth through creativity, collaboration, and community. If you're ready to be a part of this exciting journey, we'd love to hear from you! 📌 Registration Link: https://forms.gle/KFnHb6GVkBNGDrCV6 🗓️ Deadline to Apply: 18th June 2026 NOTE: THIS RECRUITMENT IS ONLY FOR '25 AND '24 BATCH. 🌐Follow Us: Website: https://facvitc.in/ Instagram: @facvitcc LinkedIn: Fine Arts Club VIT Chennai 📧 Email: facvitcc@gmail.com 📌 Need Assistance? Reach out to our Student Heads: 🎨 Design: Pragnya P - 9884967992 Reshma M - 9025048895 📢 Publicity: Arya Amte - 9584374245 💻 Technical: Keshav Kumar - 9771867622 📋 Management and Project: Sharon R - 9566003056 Tanya Vasudevan - 9372080994 👩‍🏫 Faculty Coordinator: Dr. Sri Ramalakshmi P Student Coordinators: Arya Amte - 9584374245 Sreyas Sanil - 9562766179 Let’s create, express, and grow together. Your artistic journey begins here. We can’t wait to welcome you to the Fine Arts Club family!

Whether you're a beginner taking your first step into technology or someone looking to take your skills further, there's a place for you here. message: Sivagami for OS : -> She teaches really really well. She goes in depth, you can ask her as many doubts as you want. -> *VERY STRICT IN GIVING MARKS* - you'd have to fight for each mark, if you are 100% correct alone you'll get a max of 9 marks -> *No PPT or Notes will be provided* - You'd have to attend all class to take notes and keep pace, if you miss a class you might fall behind easily. -> Lab MATs and FATs will be definitely hard. You might as well not get the output. Some have got B C as well in Labs easily. -> Will expect a lot of effort from your side for projects, but wont push you to write some unrelated papers. -> Class average will be in mid 20s The choice is yours :)

message: Teaches really well in class, can make notes in class and also shares his handwritten study materials and other resources. DA's are written assignments, gives full to everyone and quiz will be based on performance but he will inc quiz marks as per class performance Fair copy checking, will get what you deserve, avg is 28-33 and class highest is 40+ Chill in lab, almost everyone got A grade even when code dint run fully and deserving ppl got S A lil strict on attendance, have to be on time and attend regularly A really awesome teacher, get on his good side and you will love the subject
